- Example demonstrates minimal boilerplate and passes in CI.","notes":"Updated fcp-host/tests/host_connector_integration.rs to use fcp_testkit::LogCapture in host_log_schema_example (push_line + assert_valid). cargo fmt ok; cargo fmt --check fails due to unrelated formatting diffs in crates/fcp-manifest/tests/manifest_golden_vectors.rs. cargo check/clippy fail due to preexisting fcp-core RateLimit pool_name missing (protocol.rs:1822) plus clippy doc/derive warnings in fcp-core.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PurpleBeaver","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:39:32.040101718Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T21:33:38.814796529Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T21:33:38.814728923Z","close_reason":"Completed example usage; checks blocked by unrelated formatting/build issues","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1z9x","depends_on_id":"bd-3bus","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:39:32.053449539Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1zw6","title":"[IDEA-23] Connector Lifecycle Manager + Canary Rollouts","description":"## Background
Connectors need safe lifecycle management: verified installs, health checks, and rollbacks. Current host supervision focuses on process control but not upgrade/rollback semantics.

## Goals
- Formalize connector lifecycle states (discovered/verified/installed/configured/active/failed).
- Add canary rollout + rollback based on health checks.
- Expose CLI/host APIs for promotion and rollback.

## Non-goals
- Full registry distribution or multi-node deployment orchestration.

## Approach
- Add lifecycle state machine in `fcp-host`.
- Track last-known-good version and restart history.
- Implement canary policy: promote after N healthy checks.

## Risks
- State transitions must be crash-safe; persist state in mesh objects.

## Success Criteria
- Host can roll back to last-known-good on health failures.
- Lifecycle state is observable via CLI/agent API.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- Canary promotion requires N consecutive healthy checks.
- Rollback reverts to last‑known‑good version automatically on failure.
","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:45:35.748092457Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T05:33:12.711751689Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T05:33:12.711680086Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-219o","title":"TEST-HOST: Host + connector subprocess integration (no mocks)","description":"# TEST-HOST: Host + connector subprocess integration (no mocks)

## Goal
Run real fcp-host with actual connector binaries via stdio, validating discovery, invoke, receipts, and health without mock connectors.

## Scope
- Spawn connector binaries (test-echo, test-streaming, plus real connectors where safe).
- Validate host introspection output schemas and rate limit aggregation.
- Verify DecisionReceipt and audit event generation.

## Constraints
- No mocked host/connector interfaces.
- Use subprocess runner or in-process harness that launches real binaries.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Integration suite covers list/introspect/invoke/health across at least two real connectors.
- Logs include correlation IDs and structured JSON.

 {"id":"bd-21fq","title":"[TRACE] Trace format + redaction policy","description":"# [TRACE] Trace format + redaction policy

## Goal
Define a deterministic trace format and redaction rules for mesh capture.

## Deliverables
- Trace schema for FCPC/FCPS frames, routing decisions, admission outcomes, timestamps, trace_id.
- Redaction policy for secrets/PII and high-risk fields.
- Canonical encoding + hashing rules for stable replay.

## Tests
- Golden vectors for trace encoding/decoding.
- Redaction tests (sensitive fields never appear in output).

## Logging Requirements
- Structured JSON logs for trace schema tests:
  - {test, trace_id, redaction_applied, result, duration_ms}.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Trace format is versioned and stable.
- Redaction rules are deterministic and enforceable.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:05:21.545370189Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T18:32:20.223118611Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T18:32:20.223048911Z","close_reason":"Trace v1 schema + redaction enforcement + golden CBOR vector","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-21fq","depends_on_id":"bd-3tja","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-01T03:05:21.559795310Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

## Acceptance Criteria
